title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.370 - Results of election to be announced
text:
321.370.  Results of election to be announced. — At any regular or special meeting of the board held within five days following the date of such election, the board shall declare the results.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 432 § 37, A.L. 1969 H.B. 322, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971)
